title: PepsiCo Brands
note: Primary company source for PepsiCo's brand portfolio, including Pepsi, Lay's, Gatorade, Doritos, Quaker, and other food and beverage brands.

title: PepsiCo 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary financial source for fiscal 2025 revenue, profitability, business scale, and operating context.

title: PepsiCo Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for PepsiCo's May 2026 market capitalization used in registry valuation inputs.

title: Open-source cola
note: Background source describing open-source cola recipes, including the concept of published and reusable cola formulas.

title: Introduction to Open Food Facts API documentation
note: Technical documentation for an open product database and API relevant to decentralized food transparency concepts.

title: Precious Plastic
note: Open hardware and open knowledge project for local plastic recycling, used as an enabling reference for reusable and locally processed packaging loops.
